name: ccc
description: Claude Code Companion skills for syncing an existing agent session to Telegram topics and sending files through CCC.

interface.shortDescription: Sync agent sessions to Telegram topics
interface.longDescription: CCC links an already-running Claude or Codex-backed agent session to Telegram by creating or reusing a topic, installing hooks, and leaving the current session running.
defaultPrompt: Sync this agent session to Telegram with CCC.
